title: Require Sanctioned Direct Control Session Owners
forbids: caller-local Civ7DirectControlSession construction outside sanctioned session owner files and tests
why: Studio and tooling code use canonical game-wire doors; direct-control session lifecycle belongs to @civ7/direct-control and the Studio server session service.
message: Use Civ7TunerSession or withCiv7DirectControlSession instead of constructing Civ7DirectControlSession locally.
